basics.name: Salman Abdullah Alsalman
basics.label: AI Consultant and Academic Professional
basics.summary: Lecturer in Computer Science at Prince Sattam bin Abdulaziz University and AI consultant specializing in artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, and computer vision. Experienced in academic teaching, student mentoring, AI instruction, IT consulting, and applied research. Passionate about using AI to support education, decision-making, healthcare applications, and practical technology solutions.

work.name: Prince Sattam bin Abdulaziz University
work.summary: Full-time lecturer in the Department of Computer Science at the College of Computer Engineering and Sciences.
highlights: Teach undergraduate courses in programming, data structures, algorithms, and web applications.
Mentor students in academic projects and research within the Computer Science department.
Contribute to academic committees including accreditation, student activities, and alumni-related initiatives.

work.name: Prince Sattam bin Abdulaziz University
work.summary: Supported course delivery and student learning in computer science.
highlights: Assisted students with foundational and advanced concepts in computer science.
Supported teaching activities, tutorials, labs, and practical programming instruction.
Participated in research collaboration with faculty members in the Computer Science department.

work.name: Tuwaiq Academy
work.position: AI Instructor for SDAIA GDP Program
work.summary: Contract AI instructor for the SDAIA GDP Program.
highlights: Delivered sessions on Python programming, neural networks, large language models, and prompt engineering.
Guided students in neural network projects and AI-related learning activities.
Helped students prepare for the PCAP certification.

work.name: Smartech Company
work.summary: Contract IT consultant supporting technology projects and strategic decisions.
highlights: Managed IT projects with a focus on healthcare application development.
Advised on strategic technology decisions and project planning.
Coordinated communication between developers, designers, and clients to support successful project delivery.

work.name: Elm Company
work.summary: Software development internship in Elm’s Innovation Unit.
highlights: Analyzed, designed, and developed a content management system using J2EE.
Gained practical experience in enterprise software development and system design.

work.name: Imam Muhammad Bin Saud Islamic University
work.summary: Part-time computer lab assistant at the College of Computer Science and Information Systems.
highlights: Assisted students with programming problems and practical computer science exercises.
Provided additional lectures and technical support to strengthen students’ programming skills.

work.name: Saudi Aramco
highlights: Responded to users’ IT support requests onsite and remotely.
Installed and configured IT equipment including printers, monitors, scanners, network cables, and modems.

education.institution: Imam Muhammad Bin Saud Islamic University

certificates.name: Certified Artificial Intelligence Consultant (CAIC™)
certificates.summary: Demonstrated expertise in core AI concepts, business applications of AI and machine learning, NLP, AI for business and society, robotics for organizations, analytics leadership, and AI-driven transformation initiatives.

certificates.name: McKinsey Forward Program
certificates.summary: Completed a four-month professional development program focused on structured problem solving, effective communication, digital fluency, strategic thinking, and leadership mindset.

publications.name: Embedded real-time bilingual ALPR
publications.publisher: 2015 International Conference on Communications, Signal Processing, and Applications (ICCSPA)
publications.summary: Conference publication on embedded real-time bilingual automatic license plate recognition. Authors: Ahmed Biyabani, Salman A. Al-Salman, and Khalid S. Alkhalaf.

teaching.description: Undergraduate teaching in programming concepts, problem solving, and practical coding skills.

teaching.institution: Prince Sattam bin Abdulaziz University, Department of Computer Science
teaching.description: Undergraduate teaching focused on data structures, algorithmic thinking, and implementation skills.

teaching.institution: Prince Sattam bin Abdulaziz University, Department of Computer Science
teaching.description: Undergraduate teaching in algorithm design, analysis, and computational problem solving.

teaching.institution: Prince Sattam bin Abdulaziz University, Department of Computer Science
teaching.description: Undergraduate teaching related to web application development and applied computing.

teaching.course: Python Programming, Neural Networks, LLMs, and Prompt Engineering
teaching.description: Delivered AI-focused training sessions and guided students in neural network projects and PCAP preparation.

portfolio.name: Malaria Cell Detection using Curriculum Learning and Faster R-CNN
portfolio.description: Designed and implemented a deep learning pipeline using Faster R-CNN with Detectron2 and curriculum learning strategies to detect malaria-infected cells in microscope images. The project achieved improved detection performance, especially on low-cost microscope images.

portfolio.name: Large-Scale Analysis of Citation Bias
portfolio.description: Developed a predictive model to assess citation likelihood based on demographic data and explore patterns related to citation behavior.

portfolio.name: Efficient Liver Disease Prediction
portfolio.description: Built machine learning classifiers for liver disease prediction using patient biomarker data.

portfolio.name: Predicting Safety Risks from Street View Photos
portfolio.description: Applied image processing and computer vision techniques to predict crime-related safety risks using street view images.

portfolio.name: AI Consulting and Strategic Technology Support
portfolio.description: Supported organizations and small businesses in understanding AI opportunities, planning AI adoption, and aligning technical solutions with business needs.
